checklistCompleted: priceOrder implements loader-based pricing with best-for-customer promo selection
auditAccounts implements visit filtering, weighted scoring, trend, recency, and status classification
settleRoute reuses priceOrder and computes route-level totals, category nets, promo usage, commission, and stop coverage
OrderPage now calls priceOrder, shows applied promotion names, and persists the priced order payload
knownRisks: Local build/test execution is environment-limited because the workspace snapshot is missing vite package files and vite/client types.

manualSpotChecks.scenario: Price Order handles empty carts, invalid qty, unknown ids, best-promo selection, threshold selection, and half-up rounding
manualSpotChecks.expectedOutcome: Implementation matches SPEC §§2-7 with exact error strings and one line-level promo per line plus one threshold promo per order

manualSpotChecks.scenario: Shelf Audit handles 0-3+ counted visits, date filtering, weighted score boundaries, and overdue threshold at >14 days
manualSpotChecks.expectedOutcome: Implementation matches SPEC §10 with sorted account output and rounded weighted scores

manualSpotChecks.scenario: Route Settlement validates routes/stops, reuses priceOrder, aggregates totals, category nets, promo usage, commission, and visited/missed stops
manualSpotChecks.expectedOutcome: Implementation matches SPEC §11 and keeps pricing/settlement behavior aligned through the shared engine
